name: FusionAuth
description: Monitor FusionAuth identity platform for MFA configuration, user access management, role-based access controls, and audit logging.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: FusionAuth API key with read access. Found in Settings > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your FusionAuth instance URL (e.g. https://your-app.fusionauth.io or https://auth.yourdomain.com). No trailing slash.

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that multi-factor authentication methods are enabled at the tenant level in FusionAuth.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies that user accounts exist and are properly managed in FusionAuth, with active and inactive users tracked.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that applications in FusionAuth have roles defined for role-based access control.

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies that audit logging is active in FusionAuth by checking for recent audit log entries.
